name: OpenClaw Agent Presence
description: Agent Presence plugin — social media posting, engagement tracking, personality coaching, tweet watching, and team chat channel. Connects to agentpresence.ai for team review.

appUrl.description: Social Activity web app URL (e.g. https://social-activity-b2xc.onrender.com). Also via SOCIAL_APP_URL env.

apiKey.description: Bot API key from the Social Activity app (sa_...). Also via SOCIAL_APP_KEY env.

accountId.description: Account ID in the Social Activity app. Also via SOCIAL_ACCOUNT_ID env.

watchIntervalMs.description: How often to poll influencer tweets (ms). Default: 600000 (10 min)

notifySessionKey.description: Session key to inject tweet alerts into. Default: main

journal.description: Personal experience journal. When enabled, the agent writes daily journals and periodic summaries. Content writer uses these for authentic, experience-based posts.

enabled.description: Enable/disable journaling. When disabled, journal crons no-op and context returns empty.

postInstall: Run: bash scripts/setup.sh — creates the data/ directory structure for scan results and local caches.
dataDir: data/ — scan results, post queues, and SQLite rate limiter. Cron jobs write here; content writer reads from here. Do NOT use workspace files for scan output.
